heading: Character of gain or loss on disposition of distributed property
label: 735 Character of gain or loss on disposition of distributed property

children.heading: Sale or exchange of certain distributed property
children.label: a Sale or exchange of certain distributed property

children.heading: Unrealized receivables
children.label: 1 Unrealized receivables
children.text: Gain or loss on the disposition by a distributee partner of unrealized receivables (as defined in section 751(c)) distributed by a partnership, shall be considered as ordinary income or as ordinary loss, as the case may be.

children.heading: Inventory items
children.label: 2 Inventory items
children.text: Gain or loss on the sale or exchange by a distributee partner of inventory items (as defined in section 751(d)) distributed by a partnership shall, if sold or exchanged within 5 years from the date of the distribution, be considered as ordinary income or as ordinary loss, as the case may be.

children.heading: Holding period for distributed property
children.label: b Holding period for distributed property
children.text: In determining the period for which a partner has held property received in a distribution from a partnership (other than for purposes of subsection (a)(2)), there shall be included the holding period of the partnership, as determined under section 1223, with respect to such property.

children.heading: Waiver of holding periods contained in section 1231
children.label: 1 Waiver of holding periods contained in section 1231
children.text: For purposes of this section, section 751(d) (defining inventory item) shall be applied without regard to any holding period in section 1231(b).

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: If any property described in subsection (a) is disposed of in a nonrecognition transaction, the tax treatment which applies to such property under such subsection shall also apply to any substituted basis property resulting from such transaction. A similar rule shall also apply in the case of a series of nonrecognition transactions.

children.heading: Exception for stock in C corporation
children.label: B Exception for stock in C corporation
children.text: Subparagraph (A) shall not apply to any stock in a C corporation received in an exchange described in section 351.
